nodes.name: Black-and-rufous swallow
nodes.summary: The black-and-rufous swallow (Hirundo nigrorufa) is a species of bird in the family Hirundinidae. Range It inhabits the miombo ecosystems of Angola, Democratic Republic of the Congo and Zambia. References
